title: Introduction to Database Optimization Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the core concepts of database optimization.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of database optimization?
options: To improve the performance and efficiency of queries and data storage
To allow more users to login

questions.question: Which of these is a common trade-off when optimizing a database with indexes?
options: Faster read operations but slower write operations
Slower read operations but faster write operations

questions.question: Which tool would you use to understand exactly how a database executes a query and to identify bottlenecks?
Which area of optimization deals with improving the physical configuration and resources of the database server?
When is the best time to start optimizing your database?
options: Before you even start a project
Only after you have identified a specific performance bottleneck using slow query logs and execution plans
Only at the end of the project lifecycle
